title: Better Furniture
description: Adds simple, vanilla-like furniture to the game
body:
Adds simple, vanilla-like furniture to the game, including tables, chairs and stools.
You can also sit on the 'lap' of an already seated player.

## Crafts:
![Stool](https://github.com/uItimatech/BetterFurniture/blob/Fabric-1.20.4/showcase/5.png?raw=true)

![Chair](https://github.com/uItimatech/BetterFurniture/blob/Fabric-1.20.4/showcase/7.png?raw=true)

![Table](https://github.com/uItimatech/BetterFurniture/blob/Fabric-1.20.4/showcase/6.png?raw=true)
